'''rashupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khachqar|khachqar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khachqar|khachqar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rashupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræshipith|ræshipith]] || [[word:ræshipij|ræshipij]] || [[word:ræshipish|ræshipish]] || [[word:ræshipi|ræshipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rashushuputh|rashushuputh]] || [[word:rashushupuj|rashushupuj]] || [[word:rashushupush|rashushupush]] || [[word:rashushupu|rashushupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rashuputh|rashuputh]] || [[word:rashupuj|rashupuj]] || [[word:rashupush|rashupush]] || [[word:rashupu|rashupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rashufputh|rashufputh]] || [[word:rashufpuj|rashufpuj]] || [[word:rashufpush|rashufpush]] || [[word:rashufpuf|rashufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rashuputhu|rashuputhu]] || [[word:rashupuju|rashupuju]] || [[word:rashupushu|rashupushu]] || [[word:rashupuku|rashupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rashuputh|rashuputh]] || [[word:rashupuj|rashupuj]] || [[word:rashupush|rashupush]] || [[word:rashupu|rashupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rashuputhul|rashuputhul]] || [[word:rashupujul|rashupujul]] || [[word:rashupushul|rashupushul]] || [[word:rashupukul|rashupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rashuputhuthu|rashuputhuthu]] || [[word:rashupujuju|rashupujuju]] || [[word:rashupushushu|rashupushushu]] || [[word:rashupuku|rashupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rashuputhun|rashuputhun]] || [[word:rashupujun|rashupujun]] || [[word:rashupushun|rashupushun]] || [[word:rashupukun|rashupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rashuputhuoro|rashuputhuoro]] || [[word:rashupujuoro|rashupujuoro]] || [[word:rashupushuoro|rashupushuoro]] || [[word:rashupukuoro|rashupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
